title: Calendar
description: Calendar component enables users to view and interact with dates in a structured format. It includes features such as date selection, event management, and navigation between months or years, making it easier to schedule, track, and organize events or appointments.

sections.title: Type
sections.description: You can choose calendar type like solar-hijri or gregorian

sections.title: Depth
sections.description: With depth property you can set view of calendar, like day, month and year

sections.title: Disabled Dates
sections.description: With disabledDates property you can disabled some dates.

sections.title: Holiday Dates
sections.description: With holidayDates you can mark specific dates as holidays.

sections.title: Navigation
sections.description: External navigation controls and date selection with onSlotClick event.

sections.title: Range
sections.description: Select a start and end date using range mode.

props.name: interface
props.description: Determines the component interface mode. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: type
props.description: Specifies the calendar system. Deprecated: prefer configuring the calendar globally via locale profile.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Determines whether the calendar is read-only. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the calendar. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique component identifier. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: Form control name. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tabindex of the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: value
props.description: The selected date value. Deprecated: use ngModel instead. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: The validation state of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: dirty
props.description: Indicates whether the component value has been modified. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: displayRange
props.description: Gets the current display range of the calendar showing the start and end dates of the visible period.

props.name: isRequired
props.description: Indicates whether the component has required validation rules. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: depth
props.description: Specifies the depth of the calendar view.

props.name: activeView
props.description: Specifies the active view of the calendar.

props.name: minValue
props.description: Sets the minimum value for the calendar.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: Sets the maximum value for the calendar.

props.name: disabledDates
props.description: Specifies the dates that are disabled in the calendar.

props.name: holidayDates
props.description: Specifies the holiday dates in the calendar

props.name: cellClass
props.description: Custom CSS classes for calendar cells. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: cellTemplate
props.description: Deprecated. Use dayCellTemplate, monthCellTemplate, or yearCellTemplate instead.

props.name: dayCellTemplate
props.description: Template for customizing day cells. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: monthCellTemplate
props.description: Template for customizing month cells. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: yearCellTemplate
props.description: Template for customizing year cells. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: showNavigation
props.description: Determines whether navigation is shown in the calendar.

props.name: count
props.description: Specifies the count of months to be displayed in the calendar.

props.name: weekend
props.description: Array of weekend day numbers (0-6, where 0 is Sunday). Used to determine which days are considered weekends for styling and behavior.

props.name: weekdays
props.description: Array of working day numbers (0-6, where 0 is Sunday). If not provided, uses the calendar system's default weekdays.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Specifies the function to be called when an option in the calendar changes.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Specifies the function to be called when the calendar loses focus.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Specifies the function to be called when the calendar gains focus.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Emitted when the value changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Specifies the function to be called when the value of the calendar changes.

events.name: onNavigate
events.description: Specifies the function to be called when navigation occurs in the calendar.

events.name: onSlotClick
events.description: Specifies the function to be called when a slot in the calendar is clicked.

events.name: activeViewChange
events.description: Emitted when the active view changes.

events.name: typeChange
events.description: Emitted when the calendar system changes. Deprecated.

events.name: minValueChange
events.description: Emitted when the minimum date changes.

events.name: maxValueChange
events.description: Emitted when the maximum date changes.

events.name: disabledDatesChange
events.description: Emitted when disabled dates configuration changes.

events.name: holidayDatesChange
events.description: Emitted when holiday dates configuration changes.

events.name: countChange
events.description: Emitted when the displayed months count changes.

events.name: tabIndexChange
events.description: Emitted when the tabIndex changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when the validation state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when the readonly state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: validationRulesChange
events.description: Emitted when validation rules change. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 */
blur()

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Registers a change callback function (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnChange(fn: (value: Date) => void): void

/**
 * Registers a touched callback function (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Writes a value to the component (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param value - The value to write.
 */
writeValue(value: Date): void

/**
 * Adds a validation rule.
 *
 * @param rule - The validation rule to add.
 */
addValidationRule(rule: AXFormValidationRule): void

/**
 * Removes a validation rule.
 *
 * @param ruleToRemove - The validation rule to remove.
 */
removeValidationRule(ruleToRemove: AXFormValidationRule): void

/**
 * Validates the component.
 *
 * @returns Promise<AXValidationSummary> - Validation result.
 */
validate(): Promise<AXValidationSummary>

/**
 * Commits a value with optional user interaction flag.
 *
 * @param value - The value to commit.
 * @param u - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
commitValue(value: Date, u?: boolean): void

/**
 * Resets the component value.
 *
 * @param e - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
reset(e?: boolean): void

/**
 * Resets validation errors.
 */
resetErrors(): void

/**
 * Marks the component as dirty.
 */
markAsDirty(): void

/**
 * Navigates forward in the calendar based on the current active view and the configured count.
 *
 * Behavior by view:
 * - day view: advances by count months
 * - month view: advances by count years
 * - year view: advances by 10 × count years
 *
 * @returns void
 */
next(): void

/**
 * Navigates backward in the calendar based on the current active view and the configured count.
 *
 * Behavior by view:
 * - day view: goes back by count months
 * - month view: goes back by count years
 * - year view: goes back by 10 × count years
 *
 * @returns void
 */
prev(): void

/**
 * Navigates to the current date and emits the navigation event.
 *
 * @returns void
 */
goToday(): void

/**
 * Navigates to a specified date and updates the view.
 *
 * @param date The date to navigate to, which can be a Date object or an AXDateTime instance.
 * @returns void
 */
navTo(date: Date | AXDateTime): void

/**
 * Sets focus to the currently selected calendar slot or the first available slot.
 *
 * @returns void
 */
focus(): void

/**
 * Toggles between different calendar views (day → month → year).
 */
toggleView(): void
